title: Content Plus+
description: This minecraft mod will add much more content to your minecraft world!
body:
Hello everybody!

This minecraft mod will add new interesting and unique things to your minecraft mod, including a brand new cow named the "Strawberry Cow" that will drop a new food source called strawberry(logical enough). This new strawberry fruit will give you resistance for five seconds after you eat it.

There are also Strawberry Shards in the game now which u can use to make strawberries, each strawberry takes 9 shards to make.These shards can be found in the remains of strawberrium which u can find in caves I believe!

There is also a new type of flower called The Freesia which has beautiful impact over your decoration! But be aware that this flower will give you Bad Luck if you break it so be careful!
